hero.title: Your reliable taxi service
hero.subtitle: to & from Munich Airport
hero.description: Professional airport transfer for individuals and groups. We travel from Munich Airport throughout Bavaria, Austria, and all neighboring countries – one-way or as a round trip. Punctual, comfortable, and at a fixed price.

grossraumtaxi.description: For large groups and corporate transfers. Maximum comfort and space.

vehicles.fixed_price_info: All prices are fixed. No hidden costs.

about.title: About Munich Airport Taxi
about.subtitle: Your trusted partner for airport transfers – Bavaria, Austria & beyond
about.description: Munich Airport Taxi was founded to provide travelers with a reliable, punctual, and comfortable transfer service to and from Munich Airport. We travel throughout Bavaria, Austria, and all neighboring countries and regions – both one-way and as round trips. We are proud to offer our customers professional service at a fair fixed price.

experience.title: Experience
experience.text: 20 years of experience in airport transfers

punctual.title: Punctuality
punctual.text: We monitor your flight and adjust pickup time accordingly

fixed.title: Fixed Prices
fixed.text: No surprises – you know the price before the ride

multilingual.title: Multilingual
multilingual.text: We speak German, English, and Turkish

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: We are here for you – around the clock

trust.title: Our Promises to You
trust.subtitle: 20 years of experience – your trust is our mission
trust.experience_sub: Your reliable airport transfer for 20 years
trust.storno: Free cancellation up to 3 hrs before
trust.fixed_price_sub: No meter – price is fixed at booking
trust.flight_wait_sub: We wait for free if your flight is delayed
trust.confirmation_sub: Directly in your inbox after booking
trust.insurance_sub: Liability & comprehensive insurance for all vehicles
trust.no_hidden_sub: What you see is what you pay – nothing more
trust.checkout_storno: ✅ Free cancellation up to 3 hrs before

cookie.title: 🍪 Cookie Settings
cookie.message: We use cookies to provide you with the best possible experience on our website. You can choose which cookies you want to allow.
cookie.necessary_desc: These cookies are essential for the basic functions of the website and cannot be disabled.
cookie.analytics_desc: Help us understand how visitors use our website to improve it.
cookie.maps_desc: Enables map display and route calculation for your transfer.
cookie.marketing_desc: Used to make advertising more relevant to you.

seo.home_title: Munich Airport Taxi - Airport Transfer Munich | Fixed Prices
seo.home_description: Professional taxi service to and from Munich Airport. Fixed prices, punctual, 24/7 available. Kombi, Van and Large Taxi. Book online now!
seo.vehicles_description: Sedan, Van and Large Taxi for every need. Transparent fixed prices for your transfer to Munich Airport – no hidden costs.
seo.about_description: Your reliable partner for airport transfers in Munich. 20 years of experience, professional driver service, available 24/7, punctual and comfortable.
seo.contact_description: Contact Munich Airport Taxi for inquiries and bookings. Phone, WhatsApp or online form – we are available 24/7.
seo.faq_title: Frequently Asked Questions - Munich Airport Taxi
seo.faq_description: Answers to frequently asked questions about our taxi service at Munich Airport: prices, booking, cancellation, vehicles and pickup.
seo.business_title: Business Service - Flughafen-muenchen.TAXI | Corporate Transfer Munich
seo.business_description: Professional airport transfer for companies: collective invoicing, pickup with name sign, business partners & employee transfers. Fixed prices, 24/7 available.
